title: Force-Velocity Contrast
description: Alternate high-torque and high-spin at same power

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 11:54 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 11:54 at 70%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 59 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/4. 11:54 at 90%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/4. 85-90% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/4. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 11:54.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 11:54 at 90%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/4. 11:54 at 90%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 90% FTP, Seated. 11:54. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 90%, 85-100 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/4. 90% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/4. 90% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 50% done. 1 intervals left. 23 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 85-90% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 35 minutes of work done. 23 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 3/4. 35 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 1 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 50% into session. 90%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 90% for 11:54. Then 11min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 90% × 11:54. Then 11min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 11:54 at 90%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 90% for 11:54. Then 11min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 90% × 11:54. Seated, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 83% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 47min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 83% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 83% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
